untranslatable_reason: Cup-with-Handle requires multi-bar pattern recognition: (1) identification of cup formation with two distinct bottoms separated by ~64 days, (2) detection of handle down-slope trend line, and (3) measurement rule calculation for target price. Available indicators cannot detect the dual-bottom cup structure or construct a custom trend line slope. The pattern requires historical shape analysis beyond point-in-time indicator values. Approximated entry as Donchian breakout with volume confirmation and price position near range high, but the core cup geometry and handle slope cannot be expressed with available indicators.
